heroSubtitleForm: Enroll a new person with face images and metadata.
heroSubtitleResult: Person has been enrolled in OpenCV.
heroSubtitleConflict: This face matches an existing person. Review the images you used and choose a next step.
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Each capture is added to the enrolled face images.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and capture one face image
uploadSubtitle: Select one or more image files from your device
apiRefBody: Base URL https://api.verifik.co. Send JSON with profile fields and at least one base64 face image per entry in images (no data URL prefix). The public docs also list optional fields such as notes, email, and phone.
apiRefEndpointDesc: Enrolls a new person into the given collection ids (collection _id values) with face biometrics for OpenCV-backed recognition.
paramImagesDesc: Array of base64 face images (raw base64, not data URLs)
paramGenderDesc: M or F (required in this demo)
paramCollectionsDesc: Array of collection _id strings; this demo loads them from GET /v2/face-recognition/collections and lets you pick one or more.
paramNationalityDesc: Optional country / nationality code or label
bullet1: This demo uses createPerson from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
bullet2: Responses may include id and a signature block alongside data depending on environment.

0.title: The Person Object
